sentence: Eliche peashizz lands deaf in a room that never asked.

wombos.definition: Something so specialized it's only recognizable to a select few — elite-tier expertise in a niche domain.
wombos.example: His knowledge of obscure vinyl pressings is peak eliche.

wombos.definition: The absolute peak of cool or impressive things. Used as a noun to refer to something undeniably excellent: 'this is the peashizz.'
